basic_details.job_title: ICMR-NIHR Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur
basic_details.short_information: ICMR – National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur (NIHR Jodhpur) has published the Project Technical Support III Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Technical Support - III position. Candidates aged up to 35 years and holding a Graduate degree in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Biomedical Sciences, Genetics, or Life Sciences with 3 years of post-qualification experience, or a Postgraduate degree in the relevant disciplines, are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 14 July 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDF and walk-in int

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per ICMR/ DoPT guidelines for SC/ ST/ OBC/ retrenched Govt employees/Ex-servicemen etc.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview/ Written Test Skill Test (wherever applicable) Document Verification Merit List

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Technical Support III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR-NIHR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR-NIHR Project Technical Support III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Technical Support - III at ICMR - National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Technical Support - III position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date for the walk-in interview is 14-07-2026. There is no prior online application deadline mentioned.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: A Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years of post-qualification experience, or a Post Graduate Degree in the same fields is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview / Written Test, Skill Test (if applicable), Document Verification, and Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICMR - National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
